title: Subtitled Rebuild 20 screening at Sitges Film Festival
display_title: Subtitled Rebuild 20 screening at Sitges Film Festival
wikitext:
[]: Subtitled Rebuild 2.0 screening at Sitges Film Festival             Quote Post by EdZ » Mon Sep 14, 2009 11:23 pm Scroll down to the ANIMA'T section If it weren't for the last two false-starts (and being in the middle of Important Lectures That Must Not Be Missed) , I'd be booking tickets already.

[]:             Quote Post by Lleonard Pler » Fri Oct 09, 2009 1:09 pm I went to this screening past Saturday, it was an amazing experience. I loved every bit of Evangelion 2.0, much better than 1.0 and, in certain aspects, even better than the original series. Good work, Anno.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Fri Oct 09, 2009 2:15 pm Hopefully someone will camrip it. It'd be nice to see an "official" translation, even if it's in Spanish.

[]:             Quote Post by carla » Tue Oct 13, 2009 8:04 am camrip with spanish subtitles would be teh absolute awesome. admittedly i don't know much about the sitges festival... i'm assuming they do present the movies with spanish subs, then? (as opposed to català, i mean).

[]:             Quote Post by Arekusu » Thu Oct 15, 2009 6:05 am I saw the film in Sitges. The subtitles were both in english (on the screen) and in spanish (in some led-screen below the main screen where the film was being shown). The spanish subs were pretty bad. On the other hand, the film was pure awesomeness. Can't wait to see it again and both 3.0&4.0.
